title: A man of God builds the same in the dark
caption:
The man you are when nobody's watching is the actual man.

The public version can be managed. The private one is the one God's building from.

He sees the 6 AM version. The words you say when you're frustrated and alone. The work you do when nobody asked for an update. The faithfulness nobody photographed.

Those moments are not a detour. They're the whole construction.

Build the private man first. The public one shows up on its own.

#faith #christianmen #integrity #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #thework #character #christianity
